item.title: Cats seem calm… until THIS happens 🐱🔥 You think it’s just normal… then it turns into chaos fast 😭 At first it’s curiosity… then they completely lose it 👀 I swear every cat reacts the SAME way… This is how I deal with the chaos 👀 Follow for daily cat chaos

item.title: 🐱 Cats use tail movement as one of their most precise emotional signals, and a slow rhythmic wag specifically indicates focused anticipation rather than excitement or agitation. Researchers studying feline body language found that cats direct this behavio
